task_completion.description: FreeCAD is opened and a new document is created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The FreeCAD application window is visible with a new active document (e.g., 'Unnamed' or 'panel_layout').

task_completion.description: A 200mm x 100mm rectangular panel outline is drawn.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A large rectangle is visible in the 3D view, representing the main boundary of the control panel.

task_completion.description: An 80mm x 50mm rectangular display cutout is drawn inside the panel.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A smaller rectangle is visible inside the main panel outline, positioned towards the top center.

task_completion.description: Two 10mm diameter circular button holes are drawn.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Two small circles are visible in the lower section of the panel outline.

task_completion.description: Linear dimensions for the total width and height are added.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Dimension lines with text (e.g., '200' and '100') are visible alongside the main panel outline.

task_completion.description: A text label 'CONTROL PANEL' is added inside the panel.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'CONTROL PANEL' is visible within the boundaries of the main panel outline.

task_completion.description: The layout is saved as panel_layout.FCStd.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The FreeCAD window title or tree view shows the filename 'panel_layout' or 'panel_layout.FCStd'.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the FreeCAD GUI to create the layout.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the FreeCAD interface with toolbars, workbenches (like Draft or Sketcher), and the Tree View being actively used, rather than just a terminal window.

integrity.description: The geometry consists of genuine FreeCAD objects.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Tree View (Combo View) on the left side of the FreeCAD window lists distinct geometric objects (e.g., Rectangle, Circle, Dimension, Text) rather than an imported image.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the task by running a pre-existing script from the terminal.
integrity.visual_evidence: The progression of screenshots shows the step-by-step creation of the geometry in the FreeCAD GUI, not just a single command execution in the terminal.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The panel outline must be 200mm (width) x 100mm (height). The display cutout must be 80mm x 50mm. The two button holes must have a 10mm diameter (5mm radius) and be positioned at Y=15. The text label must explicitly read 'CONTROL PANEL'. The final file must be saved as '/home/ga/Documents/FreeCAD/panel_layout.FCStd'.
